output.answer:
<tool_call>
{"name": "execute", "arguments": {"kg": "wikidata", "sparql": "SELECT DISTINCT ?team ?teamLabel ?city ?cityLabel ?population ?stadium ?stadiumLabel 
WHERE {
  ?team wdt:P1026 wd:Q388075 .
  ?team wdt:P131 ?city .
  ?city wdt:P1082 ?population .
  ?team wdt:P997 ?stadium .
  OPTIONAL { ?team rdfs:label ?teamLabel FILTER (lang(?teamLabel) = "en") }
  OPTIONAL { ?city rdfs:label ?cityLabel FILTER (lang(?cityLabel) = "en") }
  OPTIONAL { ?stadium rdfs:label ?stadiumLabel FILTER (lang(?stadiumLabel) = "en") }
}"}}}
</tool_call>
output.formatted:
<tool_call>
{"name": "execute", "arguments": {"kg": "wikidata", "sparql": "SELECT DISTINCT ?team ?teamLabel ?city ?cityLabel ?population ?stadium ?stadiumLabel \nWHERE {\n  ?team wdt:P1026 wd:Q388075 .\n  ?team wdt:P131 ?city .\n  ?city wdt:P1082 ?population .\n  ?team wdt:P997 ?stadium .\n  OPTIONAL { ?team rdfs:label ?teamLabel FILTER (lang(?teamLabel) = \"en\") }\n  OPTIONAL { ?city rdfs:label ?cityLabel FILTER (lang(?cityLabel) = \"en\") }\n  OPTIONAL { ?stadium rdfs:label ?stadiumLabel FILTER (lang(?stadiumLabel) = \"en\") }\n}"}}}
</tool_call>

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?team ?teamLabel ?city ?cityLabel ?population ?stadium ?stadiumLabel WHERE {
  ?team wdt:P144 wd:Q388075 .
  ?team wdt:P131 ?city .
  ?city wdt:P1082 ?population .
  ?team wdt:P997 ?stadium .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?team rdfs:label ?teamLabel
    FILTER(lang(?teamLabel) = "en")
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?city rdfs:label ?cityLabel
    FILTER(lang(?cityLabel) = "en")
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?stadium rdfs:label ?stadiumLabel
    FILTER(lang(?stadiumLabel) = "en")
  }
}
```

Execution result:
Got no rows and 7 columns

You should follow a step-by-step approach to generate the SPARQL query:

Additional rules to follow:
- Explain your thought process before and after each step and function call.
- Do not ask the user for clarification until you have made an initial attempt at completing the task. When the task input is incomplete or ambiguous, proceed based on reasonable assumptions.
- Do not use "SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language ..." in SPARQL queries. It is unsupported by the used QLever SPARQL endpoints. Use rdfs:label or similar properties to get labels instead.
